meaning: n.[化](耐火的)硅铝氧氮聚合材料
examples: The results show that after being corroded, the structure of TiN/O′-Sialon material is composed of slag zone, penetrated zone and unchanged zone.
Sialon bonded silicon carbide bricks, characterized by good resistance to oxidation and alkali corrosion, are mainly used on the underside, belly and bosh of blast furnace.
